What we know so far: Supreme Leader Khamenei killed, as Iran launches retaliatory strikesIran responds by launching missiles and drones towards Israel and four Gulf Arab countries that host US military bases. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cx2dyz6p3weo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cx2dyz6p3weo#1 Sun, 01 Mar 2026 02:00:21 GMT
Lyse Doucet: This is an extraordinary moment Iran has been preparing forThe killing of the supreme leader will be a huge jolt to the Islamic Republic, which will try hard to show it has a plan in place. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c98g91wgdd8o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c98g91wgdd8o#1 Sun, 01 Mar 2026 01:45:52 GMT
Ayatollah Khamenei's iron grip on power in Iran comes to an endIranian state TV confirms the supreme leader has been killed on the first day of massive US and Israeli air strikes on the country. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c3gdnpjvj4ko?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c3gdnpjvj4ko#1 Sun, 01 Mar 2026 01:47:42 GMT
Bowen: A dangerous moment, but US and Israel see opportunity not to be missedIsrael and the US believe Iran's regime is vulnerable, dealing with an economic crisis and the aftermath of protests. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cn0z9012291o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cn0z9012291o#1 Sun, 01 Mar 2026 02:03:31 GMT
Watch: How US-Israel strikes on Iran unfolded Iran launched retaliatory attacks in the Middle East after US-Israel strikes across the country. https://www.bbc.com/news/videos/clyv5rnd8r0o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/videos/clyv5rnd8r0o#1 Sat, 28 Feb 2026 22:56:36 GMT
Chris Mason: Trump calls Starmer as US and Europe diverge on Iran strikesThe UK was not involved in, nor has it endorsed, the strikes on Iran by Israel and the US. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c8eg97x5446o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c8eg97x5446o#2 Sun, 01 Mar 2026 00:03:06 GMT
Minister Josh Simons resigns after Labour Together claimsSimons faced claims the think tank he used to run commissioned a report which looked into the background of journalists. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cq6q0l9e7plo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cq6q0l9e7plo#2 Sat, 28 Feb 2026 20:14:44 GMT

Man, 49, dies taking part in skydive at airfieldPolice say they were called to Dunkeswell Aerodrome at about 13:00 GMT on Saturday. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cdxze91k0rzo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cdxze91k0rzo#2 Sat, 28 Feb 2026 21:26:17 GMT
